title: vicia exigua var. hassei
intro: Vicia exigua var. hassei, also known as Hase's vetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hase's vetch include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Vicia exigua var. hassei include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and to soothe digestive problems.
